title: Trump Misinformation on Charlotte Refugee Case
summary: Trump incorrectly stated the suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case was an immigrant. The suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the spread of misinformation and its potential impact on public perception of immigration issues in Charlotte.

title: Hayward: Major Employer in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a swimming pool filter maker based in Charlotte, employs over 1,000 workers in Clemmons, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the economic importance of manufacturing companies in smaller North Carolina towns.

title: Trade Shows in Charlotte Leverage Canopy Tents
summary: Charlotte trade show exhibitors focus on flexibility, visibility, and ROI using custom canopy tents.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates marketing strategies employed by businesses in Charlotte to enhance brand presence.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks VP in Charlotte
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is hiring a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment activity within the financial sector in Charlotte.

title: Florence Airport Passenger Increase, Route Loss
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost its American Airlines flight to Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the changing dynamics of regional air travel and connectivity to major hubs like Charlotte.

title: Women Charged in Child Abuse Death in Charlotte
summary: Three women in Charlotte, NC, are charged with torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a horrific case of child abuse and raises concerns about child welfare in Charlotte.

title: Man Arrested for Assault in Salisbury, Wanted in VA
summary: Eugene D. Nolen, 40, is jailed for knife assault and preventing a girl from leaving a Salisbury home. Also wanted in Virginia.
charlotte_impact: Details a violent crime and the suspect's connection to other jurisdictions.

title: Spring Heat Wave Expected in North Carolina
summary: A record heat wave is forecast for North Carolina, with temperatures expected to reach the 70s and 80s.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather updates and alerts residents to prepare for unusually warm temperatures.

title: ChatGPT Health Errs in Medical Urgency
summary: Study finds ChatGPT Health often incorrectly assesses medical urgency, advising patients to delay emergency care.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about the reliability of AI in healthcare decision-making.

title: Kyle Busch Settles Lawsuit with Pacific Life
summary: Kyle Busch settles lawsuit with Pacific Life Insurance over an alleged retirement scheme. Details are confidential.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a legal settlement involving a prominent figure, though details remain undisclosed.

title: Rowan County Man Shoots Self to Avoid Court
summary: Jason Michael Wyatt Jr., 24, shot himself to avoid a court date and was arrested on March 3, 2026.
charlotte_impact: Details a desperate attempt to evade the legal system and the consequences faced.

title: SC Man Sentenced for Meth, Linked to Cartel
summary: A South Carolina man was sentenced to nearly 13 years for distributing meth and was linked to the Sinaloa cartel.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the connection between local drug trafficking and international criminal organizations.

title: Safety Advice: Stuck on Train Tracks
summary: Police advise immediate action if stuck on train tracks, following a Gastonia crash earlier this year.
charlotte_impact: Promotes railroad crossing awareness and provides safety guidelines to prevent accidents.

title: Gastonia Police Locate Missing Teen Quickly
summary: Gastonia Police used the Real Time Crime Center to quickly locate a missing teen with special needs.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the effectiveness of technology in assisting law enforcement and ensuring public safety.

title: Pedestrian Fatality in Northwest Charlotte
summary: A pedestrian was hit and killed in northwest Charlotte, prompting CMPD to urge drivers to find alternate routes.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a tragic traffic accident and its impact on local traffic and safety.
